bench_setup.notes: I2C loopback: I2C1 master (PB6=SCL, PB7=SDA) connected to I2C2 slave (PB10=SCL, PB11=SDA) via 2 wires. Internal pull-ups used (~40kΩ). Master writes {0xA1,0xB2,0xC3,0xD4} to slave addr 0x42, then reads back. PASS if 4/4 bytes match. Continuous retry loop.

peripheral_signals.notes: I2C1 SCL, AF4, open-drain with internal pull-up. Wire: PB6 ↔ PB10.
I2C1 SDA, AF4, open-drain with internal pull-up. Wire: PB7 ↔ PB11.
I2C2 SCL slave, AF4, open-drain with internal pull-up. Wire: PB6 ↔ PB10.
I2C2 SDA slave, AF4, open-drain with internal pull-up. Wire: PB7 ↔ PB11.
